critical_code_review_comments: Architecture.jsx previously contained trailing garbage lines (125-128) after the function's closing brace that caused a Babel parse error and prevented the /architecture route from rendering. Fixed by removing the duplicate fragment. Recommend E1 double-check any diff/patch tooling that produced this trailing content to avoid regression in future edits.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 routes (/, /emergency, /dashboard, /donors/register, /camps, /document, /architecture) render without console errors on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. 'Gemini' has been fully purged from the visible UI. /architecture shows 11 Gemma 4 references including the two code-snippet cards with .with_model("gemma", "gemma-4"). Backend server.py intentionally still uses gemini-3-flash-preview (Emergent LLM key mapping) — do not flag.
